index.badge: Cross-border creator collaboration platform for Chinese merchants
index.heroDesc: CreatorBridge helps Chinese cross-border brands connect with TikTok, Instagram, YouTube creators. Smart contracts and milestone payments make every collaboration secure, transparent, and traceable.
index.stepsSubtitle: From posting needs to settlement—CreatorBridge makes cross-border creator collaboration simple and efficient.
index.step1Desc: Merchants submit collaboration needs: target country, platform, budget, verification conditions, and milestone payment ratios.
index.step2Desc: Creators browse the marketplace, view details, then submit applications and quotes; merchants review and select.
index.step3Desc: Merchant prepays into escrow; funds are released step by step as milestones are completed.
index.step4Desc: The system checks verification conditions; when thresholds are met, the final payment is released automatically.
index.dualRoleTitle: Merchants and creators, each gets what they need
index.merchantDesc: Chinese cross-border brands, factories, trading companies
index.merchantBullet1: Post campaigns and match with global creators
index.merchantBullet4: Creator trust tiers to reduce risk
index.creatorDesc: TikTok / Instagram / YouTube content creators worldwide
index.creatorBullet1: Discover brand collaborations from Chinese merchants
index.creatorBullet3: Build your reputation with trust tiers
index.feat1Desc: Merchant prepays into platform escrow so creators get paid after delivery; both sides are protected.
index.feat2Desc: Split collaboration into milestones; each stage releases the corresponding share of payment, reducing risk for both.
index.feat3Desc: Set verification targets (views, likes, engagement); the system checks automatically and reduces disputes.
index.feat4Desc: Reputation based on fulfillment, on-time rate, and disputes—helps merchants find reliable creators.
index.feat5Desc: North America, Europe, Southeast Asia; TikTok, Instagram, YouTube and more.
index.feat6Desc: Merchants subscribe monthly (Basic/Advanced/Team); creators use the platform free; costs are transparent.
index.ctaSubtitle: Whether you're a Chinese merchant looking for overseas channels or a global creator wanting to work with Chinese brands, CreatorBridge finds the best partner for you.
index.footerTagline: Cross-border creator collaboration platform for Chinese merchants
